hooks.command: f=$(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.tool_response&&j.tool_response.filePath)||(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||"";process.stdout.write(p)}catch(e){}})'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.md|*.mdx) npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true
